changeSet.author: Gleb Zapara
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE admins( id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, surname VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, email VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL CHECK (email ~ '^[A-Za-z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Za-z0-9.-]+\.[A-Za-z]{2,}$'), password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, role VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL );

changeSet.author: zapara
zapara
Gleb Zapara
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE students( id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, surname VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, email VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL CHECK (email ~ '^[A-Za-z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Za-z0-9.-]+\.[A-Za-z]{2,}$'), password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, group_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES groups(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE, phone_number VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL CHECK (phone_number ~ '^\+[0-9]{9,15}$'), image VARCHAR(255), role VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL );

changeSet.author: Gleb Zapara
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE subjects( id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, course SMALLINT NOT NULL CHECK (course >= 1 AND course <= 6), speciality VARCHAR(2) NOT NULL, department_id INTEGER REFERENCES departments(id) NOT NULL );

changeSet.author: Gleb Zapara
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE teachers( id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, surname VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, email VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL CHECK (email ~ '^[A-Za-z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Za-z0-9.-]+\.[A-Za-z]{2,}$'), password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, phone_number VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL CHECK (phone_number ~ '^\+[0-9]{9,15}$'), department_id INTEGER REFERENCES departments(id) NOT NULL, image VARCHAR(255), role VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL );

changeSet.author: Gleb Zapara
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE lessons ( id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY, subject_id INTEGER REFERENCES subjects(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE SET NULL, teacher_id INTEGER REFERENCES teachers(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE SET NULL, day_of_week day_of_week_enum NOT NULL, start_time TIME NOT NULL, end_time TIME NOT NULL );

changeSet.author: Gleb Zapara
